beforeCaseBaseline: The body system starts in a stable baseline before the case disruption appears.
centralCaseQuestion: What hidden mechanism explains the patient clues?

hiddenTruthTimeline.event: The disease mechanism begins before the detectives understand it.

investigationTimeline.readerKnowledge: Readers see a clue but not the diagnosis.

audienceInterpretationTimeline.expectedInterpretation: Readers suspect a plausible but incomplete explanation.
audienceInterpretationTimeline.controlledMisread: The clue is intentionally framed as ambiguous.

clueLedger.clue: A pattern that points to the disease mechanism.
clueLedger.pressure: Repeated clues make the first reading unstable.
clueLedger.retrieve: Detectives return to the clue before the reveal.
clueLedger.reframe: The clue becomes evidence of the real mechanism.
clueLedger.revealUse: Used in the final proof chain.

redHerringAudit.usefulness: Teaches why the wrong path is tempting.
redHerringAudit.resolution: Falls apart when the proof chain is complete.

fairRevealProofChain.proofPoint: The clue chain supports the diagnosis.

repairCodaPlan.openerCallback: The final beat echoes the opener.
repairCodaPlan.finalImage: The detectives watch the restored system stabilize.

storyDnaRotation.noveltyNotes: Uses a different prop and setting than the prior story.
